name: Passover Rhubarb Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow 2-quart baking dish, mix together 1-1/4 cups sugar and tapioca. Add rhubarb, raspberries, and lemon juice; stir gently but thoroughly. Allow mixture to stand for 15 minutes to 1 hour, stirring several times to soften the tapioca.
2. In a food processor or bowl, combine matzo meal, remaining 1/2 cup sugar, margarine, and nutmeg until a fine crumb forms. Press into lumps and crumble over the rhubarb mixture. Bake at 375°F (190°C) until the cobbler is bubbling in the center and the top is golden brown, about 1 hour. Let cool for 15 minutes; serve in bowls topped with sorbet if desired.
